title: Unicode issue with VALUES query
key_bug_features: VALUES query fails with multiple Unicode values
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_unicode (id INT PRIMARY KEY, label NVARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_unicode (id, label) VALUES (1, 'Concerto' COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci);
INSERT INTO test_unicode (id, label) VALUES (2, 'Opéra' COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci);
SELECT DISTINCT label FROM test_unicode WHERE label IN ('Opéra', 'Concerto');
SELECT DISTINCT label FROM test_unicode WHERE label IN (SELECT label FROM test_unicode WHERE id = 1);
